query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS booking_metrics (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  occupancy_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  total_bookings INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_revenue DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  average_daily_rate DECIMAL(10,2),
  revenue_per_available_room DECIMAL(10,2),
  page_views INT DEFAULT 0,
  conversion_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  search_ranking INT,
  review_score DECIMAL(2,1),
  total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0,
  new_reviews_today INT DEFAULT 0,
  area_avg_occupancy DECIMAL(5,2),
  area_avg_review_score DECIMAL(2,1),
  page_views_vs_competitors DECIMAL(6,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_date (user_id, metric_date),
  INDEX idx_booking_metrics_user_id (user_id),
  INDEX idx_booking_metrics_date (metric_date DESC),
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

  conversion_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  search_ranking INT,
  review_score DECIMAL(2,1),
  total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0,
  new_reviews_today INT DEFAULT 0,
  area_avg_occupancy DECIMAL(5,2),
  area_avg_review_score DECIMAL(2,1),
  page_views_vs_competitors DECIMAL(6,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_date (user_id, metric_date),
  INDEX idx_booking_metrics_user_id (user_id),
  INDEX idx_booking_metrics_date (metric_date DESC),
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)
